title: Luma AI 推出 Timeline 剪辑与 EDL 导出
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Luma
@LumaLabsAI
Your footage. Your cut. One canvas.
Assemble it on Timeline, where your edit takes shape. Keep your full-resolution files right where you work, without proxies or downgrades. Then send the whole thing into your finishing suite with EDL Export, frame for frame.
The first cut and the final cut now live on one path. You build it once and it moves with you.
Try it today → lumalabs.ai/app
00:00

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 你的素材。你的剪辑。一张画布。 在 Timeline 上组装，你的剪辑逐渐成形。将全分辨率文件保留在你工作的地方，无需代理或降级。然后通过 EDL 导出，逐帧发送到你的后期合成套件。 初剪和终剪现在同在一路。你只需构建一次，它随你而动。 立即试用 → http：//lumalabs.ai/app
